benchmark.corpus: 1,000 mixed log lines in one source/service/env/host group
benchmark.command_shape: One BenchmarkLogTokenizerFactorial invocation, benchtime=500ms, count=5, benchmem
benchmark.caution: The semantic-value ablation extractor is intentionally unoptimized; use its full-path measurements only to characterize the prototype. Tokenizer-only, matcher-only, and existing full extractor comparisons are controlled.
